The PR removes memory-core's listener-level archive-file early return so reset/deleted transcript archives can be scheduled for live session reindexing, and adds a focused regression test for that path.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main returns before scheduling archive session files, while the later delta batch explicitly handles usage-counted reset/deleted archives. I did not run tests in this read-only review, but the code path and contributor before/after terminal proof are coherent.
